title: Crypto Daily Crash-Candle Reversion v1 - In-Sample (IS) Baseline
oos_seal_confirmation: Each symbol sliced to year<=2023 BEFORE any computation; rows_after_2023_used = 0 for all three. No 2024/2025/2026 bar entered the engine. A late-IS entry that cannot complete its 3-bar horizon by 2023-12-31 exits data_end at the 2023-12-31 close (no 2024 bar read). OOS 2024-2025 and 2026 remain SEALED.

data_qa.qa_verdict: CLEAN on the IS slice for all three symbols

friction_model.note: net = gross - friction per trade; engine returns GROSS only

BTC.note: BTC primary clears trade-count, net expectancy, top-3-removal, PF (gross/base/stress). BUT 2020 alone is 96% of net; ex-2020 BTC net base is only +2.7% over 3 years / 55 trades (essentially flat), and 2022 (bear) is -17.6% gross. Edge is concentrated in a single bull year.

SOL.note: SOL median net base is NEGATIVE (-0.11%) despite a positive total - the total is winner-skewed. Dominance >100% because 2021 net exceeds the all-years total (other years net to a drag).

combined.note: Combined net base PF 1.456 (>1.3) and survives 0.45% stress. BUT 2021 alone is 98% of combined net; ex-2021 combined net base is only +8.2% over 3 years / 195 trades, and 2022 (bear) is -141% gross pooled (every symbol negative in 2022).

top3_winner_removal_gate.verdict: PASS on all symbols and combined at base friction - a clear improvement over CODR-1 (which failed 2/3 gross). This gate is NOT the failure point for crash-candle v1.

sequence_risk_preliminary.label: SEQUENCE_RISK_PRELIMINARY_NONBINDING
sequence_risk_preliminary.basis: combined net-base per-trade returns, seeded bootstrap seed=0 5000 iters
sequence_risk_preliminary.note: Preliminary only, NOT a gate at D11. Full sequence-risk check is a later ladder step.

verdict_reasoning: 6 of 8 hard gates pass, including ALL of the BTC-primary gates (>=30 trades, net expectancy>0, top-3-removal positive) plus combined net PF>1.3, 0.45% stress survival, and 3/3 symbols individually positive after friction. This is a material improvement over CODR-1 (which failed trade-count, top-3, PF-net, and combined-stress). HOWEVER the single-year-dominance hard gate FAILS hard: 2020 is 96% of BTC net and 2021 is 98% of combined net; ex-dominant-year net is essentially flat (BTC +2.7%, combined +8.2%), and every symbol LOSES in the 2022 bear. The edge is concentrated in 2020-2021 bull regime, exactly the regime fragility the ladder is built to catch. A failed hard gate forbids IS_CONTINUE; but no explicit IS_FAIL trigger fired (BTC primary did NOT fail hard, combined friction did NOT fail, BTC top-3 did NOT fail, trade count did NOT fail) - so the conservative verdict is IS_WATCH, not IS_FAIL and not IS_CONTINUE.

recommendation.headline: IS_WATCH - do NOT run OOS yet; the single-year-dominance failure must be confronted before any OOS protocol is frozen.
recommendation.next_step: Per the D9 ladder an IS_WATCH may proceed to Crypto-D12 (OOS protocol pre-registration) under SEPARATE authorization - but ONLY if D12 pre-registers an explicit regime / single-year robustness analysis as a first-class OOS acceptance criterion. OOS 2024-2025 stays SEALED until a D12 protocol is committed.
recommendation.what_d11_proves: The raw crash-candle reversion has enough BTC events (69) to power a friction-survivable, top-3-robust, per-symbol-positive IS profile - the structural problem that killed CODR-1 (BTC signal sparsity) is solved by dropping the trend/confirmation filter.
recommendation.what_d11_does_not_prove: It does NOT prove a regime-robust edge. The net is a single-bull-year artifact (BTC 2020, combined 2021); the strategy loses across all three symbols in the 2022 bear; and no OOS bar has been touched. This is an IS profile only, not a validated, paper-ready, or live-ready edge.
recommendation.central_risk: Regime concentration. If the 2020-2021 bull conditions do not recur, the ex-bull profile is roughly flat-to-negative. OOS 2024-2025 (which includes both bull and chop) is the real test - and it stays sealed until D12.
recommendation.anti_overfit_reminder: No tuning of v1: do not change the -5% trigger, do not switch to -7%/-10%, do not add an SMA/trend or confirmation filter, do not change the 3-bar exit. Any of those would be a NEW spec id and a fresh ladder, never an edit to crash-candle v1.
recommendation.fail_path: If a later step (or human review) judges the single-year dominance disqualifying, park crash-candle v1 as a bull-only artifact and do not run OOS.

final_line: Crypto-D11 is an IS baseline only; crash-candle reversion v1 is IS_WATCH (strong BTC-primary profile, but single-year-dominance hard gate fails and the edge is a 2020-2021 bull artifact). No crypto strategy is validated, paper-ready, live-ready, or authorized for execution; OOS 2024-2025 and 2026 remain sealed.
